item.title: Singly linked list in C: solved exercise with insert and delete
item.description: Solved singly linked list exercise in C with head insertion, value search, and node deletion.

item.title: Doubly linked list in C: solved exercise with insert and traversal
item.description: Learn doubly linked list in C with a solved exercise: append, forward/backward traversal, and leak-free memory cleanup.

item.title: Circular linked list in C: solved insert and traversal exercise
item.description: Solved circular linked list exercise in C with tail insertion, safe traversal, and memory cleanup.

item.title: Stack in C: solved exercise with push, pop, and peek
item.description: Solved stack exercise in C with push, pop, and peek on a fixed array, including overflow/underflow checks.

item.title: Queue in C: solved exercise with circular array
item.description: Solved queue exercise in C using a circular array with O(1) enqueue and dequeue operations.

item.title: Binary tree in C: solved insertion and search exercise
item.description: Solved binary search tree exercise in C with node insertion and recursive search.

item.title: AVL tree in C: solved exercise with basic rotations
item.description: Solved AVL tree exercise in C with insertion and rotations to keep balance.

item.title: Hash table in C: solved exercise with chaining
item.description: Solved hash table exercise in C with collisions handled through chaining.

item.title: Priority queue in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved priority-queue exercise in C with ordered insertion.

item.title: Graph adjacency list in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved graph-representation exercise in C using adjacency lists.

item.title: BFS in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved BFS traversal exercise in C on a small graph.

item.title: DFS in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved DFS traversal exercise in C with recursive approach.

item.title: Insert into a sorted linked list in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved exercise to insert a node in ascending order into a singly linked list.

item.title: Delete a node from a singly linked list in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved exercise to delete a node by value from a singly linked list.

item.title: Reverse a linked list in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved exercise to reverse a singly linked list iteratively.

item.title: In-order traversal of a binary tree in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved exercise on in-order traversal in a binary tree in C.
